decomp_lessons: Do not treat a PR title as proof that a decomp fix landed; verify `merged_at`, changed files, and diff content before reusing it as precedent.
Closed, unmerged PRs with zero net diff should be indexed mainly as provenance/search breadcrumbs, not as code-change records.
When a title names a specific module but the diff is empty, future work should search neighboring or later PRs for the actual implementation instead of inferring details here.
